sections.heading: Atlas Data Federation
sections.body:
Learn how to set up AWS (Amazon Web Services) private endpoints from the Atlas CLI, Atlas
User Interface, and API (Application Programming Interface).

sections.heading: View the List of Private Endpoints
sections.body:
Learn how to view the list of private endpoints for the federated database instances
through the Atlas CLI, Atlas UI, and API (Application Programming Interface).

sections.heading: Edit the Private Endpoint for a Federated Database Instance
sections.body:
Learn how to edit the comment associated with a private endpoint
for federated database instances from the Atlas CLI, Atlas User Interface, and API (Application Programming Interface).

sections.heading: Delete a Private Endpoint for a Federated Database Instance
sections.body:
Learn how to delete a private endpoint for your federated database instances from the
Atlas CLI, Atlas User Interface, and API (Application Programming Interface).
